title: No Cat Hiss
description: This resource pack mutes cat hissing, because it's scary and painful for ears.
body:
[![Also Avalible on CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Also%20Avalible%20on-CurseForge-orange?logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/no-cat-hisses)

## Why I made this mod
Everytime, my cat in Minecraft hisses, it scares me. It's too sudden.

## How to install
1. Download resource pack from "Files" tab
2. DO NOT UNPACK `.zip` folder
3. Place it into `resourcepacks` folder in your Minecraft folder (by default it's `C:\Users\(your username)\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks`)
4. Enable pack in Settings >> Resource Packs
5. Enjoy!

## Q&A

<details>
<summary>Q. Does this mod mutes all cat sounds?</summary>
A. No, this mod mutes only cat hissing.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Q. The cat hissing is not scary.</summary>
A. Then, why are you here?
</details>


<details>
<summary>Q. What version is this resource pack for?</summary>
Any version from 1.20. If you're on 1.20 and seeing screen that resource pack may be not compatible with your version (on enabling), ignore it.
</details>
